# Lousy Agents

> Developer tooling for coding agent governance, observability, and least-privilege infrastructure.

## Projects
- agent-shell: Rust-based shell shim for agent observability and governance
- lousy-iam: Least-privilege IAM policy generator

## Documentation
- [Overview](/docs/README)
- [init Command](/docs/init)
- [new Command](/docs/new)
- [lint Command](/docs/lint)
- [copilot-setup Command](/docs/copilot-setup)
- [MCP Server](/docs/mcp-server)

## Raw Markdown (for AI agents)
All documentation is available as raw markdown at the same path with a .md extension.
Example: /docs/init.md
